info.title: Azure Chaos Studio
info.description: Azure Chaos Studio REST API for managing chaos engineering experiments, targets, capabilities, and their types. Enables controlled fault injection to improve application resilience.

get.summary: List experiments in a resource group

parameters.name: running
parameters.description: Filter results based on whether the experiment is currently running

get.summary: List all experiments in a subscription
List all executions of an experiment

parameters.name: resourceUri
parameters.description: The resource URI to list targets for

get.summary: List target types for a location
List capability types for a target type
List available operations for the Chaos Studio provider

subscriptionId.name: subscriptionId
subscriptionId.description: The ID of the target subscription

resourceGroupName.name: resourceGroupName
resourceGroupName.description: The name of the resource group (case insensitive)

targets.description: List of target references (for List type)
